{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hanging Tree seed
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The seed of a [[Hanging Tree]] is an oblong red ball about the size of a walnut.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|There is a seed to the [[Hanging Tree]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Hanging Tree seed]] is one of the only things that can send [[Incarnations]] back to their prison, other than another [[Ragnarus Traveler]] or their own foolishness.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Where is the seed to the Hanging Tree?”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
